title: haveabreak
subtitle: Disconnect to Reconnect
moveWarningDesc: The goal is to step away. Please keep hands off the mouse and keyboard!
moveWarningDescMobile: The goal is to step away. Please keep hands off the screen!
congratsDesc: You took a genuine break. Your body and mind thank you.
timerTips: Don't move your cursor. Just sit back, relax and breathe.
Take a deep breath in... and out.
Close your eyes for a moment.
Let go of tension in your body.
noCustomTips: No custom tips yet. Add one above!
